title: Brandads 20 AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Vintage filmstrip collage of a woman Ultra-realistic IMAX-level Netflix-style asymmetrical film-style memory collage portrait, 9:16 vertical composition, use the uploaded nose, lips, hairstyle influence, skin tone and overall appearance from the reference image, no facial changes, no age changes and no body distortion, a cool style fresh and realistic portrait photography collage designed like a rolling timeline of memories, composed of overlapping film frames, contact-sheet strips and transparent negatives arranged in an artistic asymmetrical layout, featuring the same young woman with luminous fair milky skin and ultra-smooth natural skin texture, her face showing a range of soft authentic emotions including joyful laughter while walking, a thoughtful and dreamy expression while looking out the window, quiet concentration while fixing her hair in the mirror, a calm cozy mood while holding a coffee, and a gentle natural smile in a candid close-up, her hairstyle preserved from the reference image with clean detailed strands and realistic texture across every frame, each panel feeling like a different personal memory captured across one beautiful visual story, clean and vibrant styling with youthful sweetness and energetic charm, soft and bright natural front lighting creating a diffused glow across her face and making the skin appear luminous and refined, ultra-rich color with creamy skin tones, fresh pastel highlights, soft daylight whites, clean neutrals and subtle warm accents creating a premium Korean editorial aesthetic, crisp facial features and sharp hair detail in every frame, realistic film-border details, subtle grain texture, slightly overlapping negative strips and scrapbook-like layering without looking messy, shallow depth of field, soft airy atmosphere, realistic reflections, storytelling composition, premium fashion-editorial mood, captured in the style of a full-frame camera with a 50mm prime lens, f/2.0, shutter speed 1/160s, ISO 100, single-point focus, photorealistic rendering, HDR, global illumination, super clear high-resolution finish, masterpiece quality, award-winning cinematography, 8K production detail.
